title: Mission Before Technology
text: Start with the operational problem. Technology exists to support the mission, not the other way around.

title: Persistent Capability
text: Design programs around sustained operational value rather than episodic demonstrations.

title: Clear Authority
text: Preserve government mission authority and clearly define contractor operational responsibilities.

title: Modular Development
text: Build programs that can evolve as mission requirements, sensors, autonomous systems, and operating environments change.

title: Operational Sustainment
text: Treat maintenance, logistics, readiness, and lifecycle support as part of the program from the beginning.

title: Evidence Before Scale
text: Use bounded pilots, measurable validation criteria, and decision gates before expanding programs.
